overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a walk along a wooden mountain pathway beside a historic stone tower, approaching a cable car station on Mount Chiliad. The scene features panoramic mountain views under a bright sunny sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain top walkway beside historic stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pathway beside the stone tower wall with mountain views ahead

entered.detail: tall historic stone wall with weathered texture running alongside the path
elevated wooden plank pathway with stone railings on the mountain edge
distant mountain peaks covered in dense green forest under blue sky
low stone barriers along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a wooden mountain pathway immediately adjacent to a large historic stone tower wall on the left. The path features stone railings on the right side overlooking a vast mountainous landscape with dense forests. The weather is clear and sunny, and no other characters or vehicles are present.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated mountain walkway with panoramic valley views

events.description: cable car chairs and station structure become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved walkway as the view opens up to reveal the cable car system ahead

entered.detail: empty cable car chairs suspended on wires approaching the station

segments.scene_description: As the path curves along the mountainside, the scene opens into a wide panoramic view of the forested valley below. The cable car chairs become visible ahead in the distance, suspended over the slopes. The stone tower wall remains on the left but falls slightly behind as the walkway extends forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: cable car boarding station on mountain peak

events.description: slowing approach as the cable car station platform comes into immediate view

agents.ego_description: approaching the cable car station with the lift chairs now immediately adjacent on the left side

entered.detail: concrete and metal cable car station structure with boarding platform
body of water visible in the distant valley below

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the cable car boarding station, with the empty lift chairs now immediately visible on the left side of the walkway. The stone tower wall and railings give way to the station platform structure, and a distant lake becomes visible in the valley below. The path leads directly toward the cable car boarding area under the station canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a mountain ridge that transitions from a narrow path beside a stone tower into an open cable car boarding station. It begins with the camera moving along a wooden pathway hugged by a historic stone wall on the left and stone railings on the right, overlooking a vast, forested mountain landscape. As the path curves, the stone wall recedes and the view expands into a wide panorama of the valley below, revealing suspended cable car chairs in the distance. The scene then shifts as the walkway leads directly toward the station platform, where the empty lift chairs come into immediate view on the left. Finally, the railings give way to the station canopy and boarding area, opening up a distant view of a lake nestled in the valley.
